title: The Heart Pirates and the Guardians
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on the heart pirates and the guardians within the The Mink Tribe and Jack's Ruin storyline.
scene: The crew encounters the Mink Tribe, Heart Pirates, and the aftermath of Jack's attack, turning the search for Sanji's group urgent.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WaaaAA AggH!!! Aaaggghh! They've been slaughtered!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The fact that their corpses are still intact means that they weren't used as sustenance, so...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's not what's at issue here, for crying >out loud!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Breathe. Curly eyebrow's with them. Even he isn't enough of an idiot to go and get himself killed.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right. There's no way they'd kick the bucket so easily!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is just a trap to shake us up and lead us on a wild goose chase.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: indeed. I do not believe them in the slightest.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Traffy-kun, your crew should be in the vicinity, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do we have some way to contact them?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Negative.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To be honest, I never expected I'd actually see them again.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait, that's right! I forgot I have one of their vivre cards.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: This is...

dialogue.speaker: Bepo
dialogue.text: Our Navigator Bepo's card.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: come to think of it, there was that talking polar bear, huh. Is he a Mink too?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Yeah.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This is his Homeland.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: He doesn't remember much of it, though.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He left the island when he was still fairly young.

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: He's been a close friend of mine for 10 years and counting. He can be trusted.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we want to get to the bottom of things, we've got no choice but to press onwards.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh yeah! There's supposed to be a city not too far ahead...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Whaddya' guys think?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then we continue forward. Better than following some random animal's orders.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Stop, please!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hold your horses! That's enough, I'm telling you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: He's a friend!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Gomu Gomu No

dialogue.speaker: Mink Guardian
dialogue.text: I don't care if he's your damn brother! An INVADER is an INVADER! MOOO!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Galaya!

dialogue.speaker: Mink Guardian
dialogue.text: UHO! Why isn't the "electro" affecting him!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If they won't listen to reason, then we've got no choice but to use brute force!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Butt out!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Jean Bart!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Crap! They're all out of control!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What crazy strength!!!

dialogue.speaker: Mink Guardian
dialogue.text: Hold it right there, guardians!

summary: The Heart Pirates and the Guardians: Luffy's group meets Wanda, Carrot, Pedro, Bepo and the Mink guardians while learning that Jack destroyed the Mokomo Dukedom and that Sanji's group may still be alive.
